name: Glpi
tagline: GLPI (Gestionnaire Libre de Parc Informatique) is a free, open-source IT Service Management (ITSM) platform used for IT asset management, helpdesk, and servic
description:
GLPI (Gestionnaire Libre de Parc Informatique) is a free, open-source IT Service Management (ITSM) platform used for IT asset management, helpdesk, and servic

Docs: https://help.glpi-project.org/documentation?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  glpi:
    image: glpi/glpi:11
    environment:
      - GLPI_DB_HOST=glpi-db
      - GLPI_DB_PORT=3306
      - GLPI_DB_NAME=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-glpi-db}
      - GLPI_DB_USER=ua12fe31e7f
      - GLPI_DB_PASSWORD=3fe41eb3f7b21047dea7b32342738ac6
    volumes:
      - glpi-data:/var/glpi:rw
    depends_on:
      glpi-db:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://localhost/
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42044:80
  glpi-db:
    image: mysql:8
    volumes:
      - mysql-data:/var/lib/mysql
    environment:
      - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=bfaf0b1e62ca08f05dfe53c2e738d9b7
      - MYSQL_DATABASE=${MYSQL_DATABASE:-glpi-db}
      - MYSQL_USER=ua12fe31e7f
      - MYSQL_PASSWORD=3fe41eb3f7b21047dea7b32342738ac6
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - mysqladmin
        - ping
        - -h
        - 127.0.0.1
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  glpi-data: null
  mysql-data: null
